allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(data['tunnels'][0]['public_url'] if data.get\('tunnels'\) else 'No URL yet'\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) if data.get\('tunnels'\) and len\(data['tunnels']\) > 0: url = data['tunnels'][0]['public_url'] domain = url.replace\('https://', ''\).replace\('http://', ''\) print\('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'\) print\('🎉 ngrok is LIVE!'\) print\('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'\) print\(\) print\(f'📱 Public URL: {url}'\) print\(f'🤖 Domain: {domain}'\) print\(\) print\('━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'\) else: print\('No tunnels found'\) ")
